// file: SealedCopy__Animal.kt
package snap.sealedCopy.nested

import me.tbsten.cream.*

/**
 * (Auto generate by @[SealedCopy] annotation of [Animal])
 * 
 * Type-preserving Animal.copy generated by @SealedCopy.
 * 
 * Updates shared abstract properties and dispatches to each subtype's copy.
 * 
 * # Example: Basic
 * 
 * ```kt
 * val state: Animal = /* one of the subtypes */
 * val updated: Animal = state.copy()
 * ```
 * 
 * # Example: Override property values
 * 
 * ```kt
 * val state: Animal = /* one of the subtypes */
 * val updated: Animal = state.copy(property = value)
 * ```
 * 
 * 
 * @see Animal
 * @see Dog
 * @see Man
 * @see Woman
 */
public fun snap.sealedCopy.nested.Animal.copy(
    name: String = this.name,
): snap.sealedCopy.nested.Animal = when (this) {
    is snap.sealedCopy.nested.Dog -> this.copy(name = name)
    is snap.sealedCopy.nested.Man -> this.copy(name = name)
    is snap.sealedCopy.nested.Woman -> this.copy(name = name)
}
````

## Input

```kt
package snap.sealedCopy.nested

import me.tbsten.cream.SealedCopy

@SealedCopy
sealed interface Animal {
    val name: String
}

sealed interface Human : Animal

data class Man(override val name: String, val beard: Boolean) : Human
data class Woman(override val name: String, val hairLength: Int) : Human
data class Dog(override val name: String, val breed: String) : Animal
```
